content.en:
In the face of many first-class supremes, Ye Tian did not dare to underestimate him, and immediately burst out with all his combat power.

"Tiangang Battle Method Seventh Style!"

"Chaos Origin Ancient Well!"

"Heaven Killing Knife!"

"Constant Light Magical Power!"

"Spear of the Hell Divine Sky!"

"The Wheel of Time!"

"Space-Time Realm!"

"Hunyuan Domain!"

......

Ye Tian's means came out together, and he fought with many first-class supreme mist beasts, if the Lord of the Yuan Gu was in Ye Tian's current situation, maybe he would also fall and die.

And Ye Tian is indeed too powerful now!

Rumble!!!

The first first-class supreme mist beast was hit hard by Ye Tian and flew out, but the attacks of the other misty beasts also fell on Ye Tian's body, directly knocking Ye Tian away.

At this moment, Ye Tian was shaken, and his blood was rolling.

Only this time of temptation, Ye Tian roughly judged his strength, infinitely close to a one-star god general, but he did not really step into the combat power level of a one-star god general.

According to his understanding, the strength of the one-star god general far exceeds that of the first-class supreme, and the first-class supreme and the one-star god will be a huge gap, once it is crossed, the one-star god will be enough to easily kill the ordinary first-class supreme in seconds.

And although this group of first-class supreme mist beasts was very fast, they were just ordinary first-class supremes, and he didn't kill the first-class supreme in an instant with one blow just now, which was enough to prove that his strength was at most the first-class supreme limit level, and he couldn't step into the chasm and step into the ranks of one-star god generals.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian fought bloodily, even if he was injured with his recovery power, he would be able to heal quickly, but those misty beasts did not have such a perverted healing ability as him, and soon the first first-class supreme mist beast fell and died.

Then, the second first-class supreme fell, and the third first-class supreme fell......

In the outside world, what kind of existence is a first-class supreme, even the first god master is only a second-class supreme, but now Ye Tian has killed several first-class supremes in a row.

With the fall of the First Rank Supreme, the terrifying Misty Beasts in the deepest part of the core area of the Mist Region awakened.

"Dare to break into the Chaos God Realm and look for death!"

As soon as the words fell, I saw a misty beast with the head of a bull and a human body appear, and it was still holding a stick in its hand, and it smashed it directly.

The void exploded, and the terrifying shadow of the stick covered everything!

"Not good!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

This is definitely a full-strength blow comparable to that of a one-star god general!

Moreover, this misty beast actually has a high level of intelligence!

Before, whether it was a cosmic god-level misty beast or a supreme-level misty beast, its intelligence was very low, and even like a beast, it sensed the existence of living beings and attacked.

But this bull-headed misty beast is different, it definitely has wisdom that is not weaker than that of humans, and its strength is too terrifying!

"There is a creature in the universe that has a star god general?"

Ye Tian felt incredible.

"Block me!"

Ye Tian opened up layers of defense, and even the Hunyuan Domain and the Space-Time Domain were used to resist the blow of the Bull Head Mist Beast.

Bang!!!

The Hunyuan Realm and the Space-Time Realm were all torn apart by a stick, carrying an invincible momentum, but because Ye Tian blocked them with the two realms for a moment, he used his constant light magic power in time to dodge.

This blow failed to hit Ye Tian!

"It's not an opponent, retreat first!"

Immediately, Ye Tian was about to use his constant light magic power to escape.

But at this moment, the bull-headed misty beast hurriedly shouted: "Your Excellency, don't go, you have passed the assessment!"

"Assessment?"

Ye Tian stopped at the junction of the inner area and the core area, if the Bull-headed Mist Beast wanted to continue to attack him, he could leave the core area of the Mist Region in one step.

Even with the strength of the Bullhead Mist Beast, don't think it's hard to catch up with him!

"What assessment?"

Ye Tian asked.

Wow!

The Bull-Headed Mist Beast stopped at a distance from Ye Tian and began to explain, "This place is called the Chaos God Realm, and it is a special world created by a great being in Chaos! As long as you know that the Chaos God Realm is great, you should know that the creatures in the chaos can't enter the universe, right? But that great being can directly forcibly stuff a world into the universe, ignoring the origin of the universe, and even blinding the origin of chaos! This is not something that anyone can do!"

"What, the Mist Region is a world in the midst of chaos?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

At this moment, he finally understood, no wonder that so many supreme-level misty beasts could be born in the mist area, and even a one-star god-level misty beast was born.

"You're from Chaos?"

Ye Tian asked.

"That's right!" the Bull-Headed Mist Beast explained, "My name is Niu Ryu, and I come from a semi-chaotic race in the Chaos and have been placed here by that great being. However, we can only stay in the Chaos God Realm, and there is no way to leave, otherwise the Origin of the Universe can easily kill me. Strictly speaking, the position you are standing in is the Chaos God Realm, and those areas outside are just a special area formed by the dispersion of the power of the Chaos God Realm. And the creatures out there, which you call the Mistbeasts, are only half-finished products that we have made. Even the misty beasts you killed just now are half-finished products! It's just that these half-finished products are a bit special and contain our power, so they can't go out, otherwise they will be detected by the origin of the universe. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian really understood.

"You say assessment, could it be that there is a inheritance here?"

Ye Tian asked again.

"Of course there is, and it is also the inheritance left by that great being, in your universe, many years ago, there was a person who passed the inheritance assessment, and finally successfully transcended and left this universe and became one of the countless registered disciples of that great being!"

Niu Ryu Road.

"What are you talking about Yuntan Heavenly Monarch?"

Ye Tiandao.

"Yes, it's that little guy, but it's a pity that that little guy has limited potential, and can only become an ordinary transcendent, and cannot become a formal disciple of that great being. Your potential is good, you have only become an Earth Venerable for a short time, and your physical body, divine power, and soul are far from being developed to the limit, but you can dodge my full blow, and you are qualified to accept the real assessment!

"Senior, how does that great existence compare to the old man of the Golden Desolation?"

Ye Tian asked.

He didn't know the strength of that great existence, if he was not as good as the old man of the Golden Desolation, why did he go to participate in the assessment, it was better to wait for the detachment and directly become the disciple of the old man of the Golden Desolation!

After all, he is one of the inheritors of the Golden Wilderness Old Man's Reserve!

"Old Man Golden Desolation, I've heard that he is also a hegemon in the chaos, but it is too far from that great being. Do you know the division of the Chaos Cultivator realm?"

Ushiru asked.

"I don't know, I only know that above the Earth Venerable is the Mandate of Heaven, and what realm is above the Mandate of Heaven, then it's not very clear!"

Ye Tian said truthfully.

This can't be blamed for his shallow knowledge, it's really that Hamon doesn't have much knowledge, or that Hamon's information about the existence above the Heavenly Mandate Realm has been erased.

Niu Ryu looked at Ye Tian with contemptuous eyes, and immediately said proudly: "Above the Mandate of Heaven is the realm of true spirits, and if the true spirit is strong and the true spirit is immortal, it will be eternal and immortal." And above the true spirit is the realm of the Great Dao, comprehending a great avenue is the realm of the Great Dao, and above the perfection of the Great Dao is the realm of the Dao, the so-called realm of the Dao is the unity of many avenues, such an existence is difficult to be killed, it is a great existence beyond time and space. And that great being is the power of the realm of harmony. As for the realm of merger, I don't know. In short, in Chaos, the Mandate of Heaven is enough to dominate a careful Chaos Continent, and the True Spirit Realm is enough to dominate the Medium Chaos Continent, and the Great Dao Realm is rare, enough to be called a hegemon, dominating countless territories. The Merge Realm is all ancient existences, existences at the true peak of Chaos. The old man of the Golden Desolation is a powerhouse of the Great Dao Realm, but he is not at a weak level in the Great Dao Realm, but he is far from reaching the perfection of the Great Dao, where is he qualified to compare with that great existence!"

"Mandate of Heaven, True Spirit, Great Dao, Harmony!"

Ye Tian immediately understood what a terrifying existence that great existence in the Chaos God Realm was, he had obtained such a huge achievement by obtaining the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique of the Golden Desolate Old Man, if he obtained the inheritance of that great existence again, wouldn't it be even further?

Of course.

There must be risks involved, but now that the merging of the two universes is imminent, he has no time.

"Senior, I want to participate in the assessment!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Okay, come with me!"

Niu Ryu Road.

Ye Tian cautiously followed Niu Ryu, although he was relieved on the surface, but in fact he was secretly vigilant, after all, he was also afraid that Niu Ryu would deceive him!
